TON FARM GIVEAWAY


🔸 Join the Giveaway for a chance to win one of the limited TON FARM Chips! A total of: F1 — 100 pcs, F2 — 50 pcs, F3 — 30 pcs, F4 — 20 pcs, F5 — 10 pcs will be distributed.


🔹 Each chip is a unique digital asset with a limited supply that may grant access to new farming features in the game.
